notes: This is a local Utah precious metals buyer. Emphasize trust, legitimacy, transparency, and simplicity. Avoid overly techy or startup-like language. Prioritize clear value messaging, contact accessibility, and credibility signals (reviews, years in business, process clarity).
visualDirection: clean, high-contrast, slightly premium financial feel with subtle luxury cues (gold accents, dark text, lots of white space)
layoutStyle: conversion-focused, simple sections, mobile-first, fast scanning
referenceNotes: Model after modern gold buyers, local service businesses, and financial landing pages. Strong hero with value prop + CTA, trust badges/reviews, simple 3-step process, pricing transparency section, FAQ, and persistent contact CTA. Avoid clutter, animations should be minimal and purposeful.
